channel.title: radius on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in radius on IT notes

item.title: radtest
item.description: To test a radius server: $ brew install freeradius-server Then: $ radtest {username} {password} {hostname} 10 {radius_secret} The 10 is the nas-port-number. Is an integer between 0 and 2^31, and it really doesn’t matter what you put here.
